name: Biome1_Island
comment: Phase-0 scale layout v5 (2026-06-11, author fix round 3): THE CITADEL SITS ON THE FAR END OF THE ISLAND FROM THE LANDING (author: 'высокая точка - на дальнем от входа конце'). West maldive chain lands on the NW shoulder; the citadel cape is the EAST point, the full island crossing lies between them; guard ring moved with the citadel. Maldive chain unchanged (CCW in UE top view).

landscape.extent_note: 201600x201600 centered on origin; create at location (-100800,-100800,-2000)

island.cliff_note: gentle shield dome rising toward the EAST cape (the citadel); the ONLY cliff is the cape's seaward face, everywhere else - beaches

slots.note: toss ORIGIN over water: RunLaunchPoint here (author places/tunes), forward aimed at the island center, ballistic arc lands on M1 (~7000 uu)
ON the start->center axis; player lands here from the sea toss
lighthouse = early-spiral landmark; chain heads WEST (CCW in UE view)
spiral passes under the citadel cape - permanent landmark showcase
landing on the NW rim - the LOW far end (~20 m beach terrace): the whole climb 19->90->160 m lies ahead, across the island to the east citadel cape
west point of the citadel ring (R~24000); entrance faces outward (toward the shoulder path)
south-west point of the citadel ring; entrance faces outward
north point of the ring; A5 terraces (-900) cut INTO the upslope toward the citadel at this yaw - natural amphitheater

ON THE VERY LIP of the EAST cape (160 m) - the FAR end of the island from the NW landing; cliff to the open sea, gentle land approach from the ring side (west); gate 3/3, permanent field until open; visible from the run start straight over M1

rules.maldive_model: AUTHOR SPEC 2026-06-11: each maldive = a micro-island barely bigger than its arena (flat top = arena bounding circle + ~900 uu rim, ~35 deg beach slope), arena DEAD-CENTER, open water between islands MANDATORY. Slope-guard arenas (ring around the citadel) are the only ones on the big island.
rules.guard_ring: guards ring the citadel at ~equal radius (~24000) INLAND of the east cape, free clear order; entrances face outward; heights 86/90/94 m - pads sit nearly flush on the dome
rules.budget_note: start->M1 is the BALLISTIC TOSS (~7000 uu), not a valve; maldive hops ~16-18k path per the author's trajectory
rules.terrain_note: GENTLE everywhere (author: 'полого везде, пляж вместо обрыва'): wide beach aprons, soft dome toward the cape, subtle pads (wide blends, NO raised rims), no empty pad discs
